title: Yijing Hexagram 55: Feng (Abundance)
description: Hexagram 55 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 55 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Abundance has success. The king attains abundance. Be not sad. Be like the sun at midday.
